idea.title: Styled Heart
idea.hook: Style your crush for every date and win his heart.
idea.hook_ru: Наряжай своего поклонника к каждому свиданию и покори его сердце.
idea.why_novel: Dress-up is a proven, populated niche on the casual portals; here it wraps an otome affinity meta. Style a suitor to each date brief, then raise his bond to unlock the next chapter.

ten_min_loop: Read the date brief (theme, palette, required tags), tap collected outfit pieces from a tabbed wardrobe onto the suitor, and a live Style score rates the match. Hit the threshold to play a short illustrated date vignette and raise affinity. An outfit gacha collects rarer pieces; per-suitor bond gates unlock new suitors and themes; a memory gallery and daily login drive the return habit. Tasteful and fully clothed, earned and rewarded-ad currency only.

sources.title: Gacha + otome pivot (2026-06-05)
sources.snippet: Merges Tim's Love-and-Deepspace and buy-outfits-for-guys ideas into one buildable verb: style-to-score, with romance as the meta wrapper.
